differences.title: 1. RENDERING
differences.leftDesc: Server-Side Rendering is primary, client-side fetching available.
differences.rightDesc: Leverages standard web APIs like Request and Response for routing.

differences.title: 2. ROUTING
differences.leftDesc: Pages directory defines routes automatically based on file structure.
differences.rightDesc: Layouts and nested routes are built-in, sharing parent data.

differences.title: 3. DATA FETCHING
differences.leftDesc: Data fetching tied to specific functions for static or server rendering.
differences.rightDesc: Data fetching is collocated with routes using loader functions.

differences.title: 4. MUTATIONS
differences.leftDesc: Requires separate API routes for data mutations and form submissions.
differences.rightDesc: Built-in support for form submissions directly via actions.

differences.title: 5. DEPLOYMENT
differences.leftDesc: Deep integration and optimization for Vercel's hosting platform.
differences.rightDesc: Works well on any Node.js server or modern hosting.

differences.title: 6. CSS SUPPORT
differences.leftDesc: Supports styled-jsx, Tailwind, CSS Modules, global CSS.
differences.rightDesc: Emphasizes standard CSS, CSS Modules, and Tailwind CSS.

differences.title: 7. LEARNING CURVE
differences.leftDesc: Steeper curve due to unique conventions and features.
differences.rightDesc: Easier for those familiar with web fundamentals.
